channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: The SpaceX IPO: 3 of the Biggest Risks to Consider
item.description: SpaceX's growth story may be captivating, but there are also some significant risks that come with the stock that investors should be wary of.

item.title: Tesla Investors Finally Get A Benchmark For The Musk Premium
item.description: For years, Tesla Inc. investors have argued about one question that has never had a clear answer: How much of Tesla’s valuation belongs to Elon Musk? The debate has become increasingly important as Tesla’s market value has grown far beyond...

item.title: Tesla Faces China FSD Lawsuit As Robotics And Valuation Risks Grow
item.description: Chinese consumers have filed a new class-action lawsuit against Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) alleging fraudulent marketing and consumer deception related to its Full Self-Driving feature in China. The case targets Tesla's largest international market and raises questions around how the company presents ...

item.title: Will Tesla Merge With SpaceX?
item.description: The possibility is more likely than one might think.

item.title: Tesla found new buyers for its Cybertruck: Kazakh emergency services
item.description: Kazakhstan’s Ministry of Emergency Situations has confirmed it will purchase additional Tesla Cybertrucks after the electric pickup proved effective in rescue operations in Almaty, the country’s largest city. The Central Asian country has become the latest small international market to adopt the ...

item.title: SpaceX Seeks $135 a Share for $75 Billion IPO, Reuters Says
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- SpaceX aims to sell 555.6 million shares ​at $135 apiece for its record-breaking $75 ​billion ⁠initial public ​offering, Reuters reported, citing an unidentified person familiar with the matter. Most Read from BloombergRussia Finance Officials Tell Putin War Spending Is Unaffordabl...

item.title: Trump Criticized Canada's China EV Deal—Elon Musk's Tesla Could Be Among Its Biggest Winners
item.description: Tesla Inc. could be reaping the benefits of the China-Canada EV agreement despite earlier criticism from President Donald Trump following the deal. Tesla Accounts For More Than 10% Of Chinese Imports According to a report by Drive Tesla Canada on...

item.title: Tesla improves Dashcam playback with awesome addition
item.description: Tesla has improved Dashcam playback with an awesome new addition, as the company has launched a web-based version that is potentially easier to navigate and operate. The tool is available at dashcam.tesla.com and will be enabled as your vehicle receives the 2026.20 Software Version. Clips that ar...

item.title: Tesla’s IPO Was One of the Greatest Ever. Why SpaceX Can’t Hope to Repeat Its Success.
item.description: Tesla stock bounced on Tuesday as CEO Elon Musk reminded investors about where his EV company started and how far it’s come. Don’t expect SpaceX to follow the same trajectory even as Musk tries to justify SpaceX’s valuation. The move came after Musk tweeted that Tesla’s IPO market cap was only 0...

item.title: Tesla bull drops blunt take on gold rival
item.description: Tesla bull Ross Gerber just took a sharp swing at Bitcoin (BTC). This comes at a time when "king crypto" has slipped below its $70,000 mark for the first time since April, while its rival, gold, continues to hold the fort in green. Gerber is the co-founder and CEO of Gerber Kawasaki Wealth ...

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving attempts 150-mile stress test: the good and the bad
item.description: I recently took my Tesla Model Y running Full Self-Driving (Supervised) v14.3.3 over 150 miles on the Pennsylvania Turnpike in an effort to truly put the system under a stress test. There were a lot of good moments, and some bad, but overall, Full Self-Driving impressed me. Last Thursday, I decid...

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi Concerns Under Texas SB 2807
Is Tesla's Model Y Driving a Lasting Recovery in Europe?
item.description: TSLA's European rebound accelerates in May as registrations surge across key markets, led by record France sales and strong Model Y demand.

item.title: Palantir, XAI, PayPal, and Robinhood stock analysis
item.description: Shay Boloor, chief market strategist at Futurum, breaks down Palantir's strong earnings report and future guidance. He also analyzes Elon Musk's decision to merge XAI and SpaceX, and the implications for Tesla shareholders. Finally, Balor offers insights into the struggles of PayPal and the poten...

item.title: Tesla Gets A Rival To Its Robotics Business, As Sales In China Eye A Recovery
item.description: Tesla stock fell more than 4.5% on Monday after OpenAI appeared to revive its robotics business. On Tuesday, the stock recovered slightly, in part due to promising deliveries from its factory in Shanghai.

item.title: Tesla robotaxi fleet in Texas reaches only 42 vehicles
item.description: submitted by /u/mountaineer [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla Semi tackles the Grapevine with a loaded trailer, leaves fleet operator ‘amazed’
item.description: Covenant Logistics, one of the largest trucking companies in the US with a fleet of over 2,600 tractors, completed a two-week evaluation of the Tesla Semi in California — including a loaded run over the notorious Grapevine pass on I-5. The company’s VP of Sustainability and Innovation, Matt McLel...

item.title: Tesla Was One of the Greatest Stock IPOs Ever. Why SpaceX Can’t Repeat Its Success.
item.description: Tesla stock dipped early Tuesday as CEO Elon Musk reminded investors about where his EV company started and how far it’s come. The move came after Musk tweeted that Tesla’s IPO market cap was only 0.1% of its current market cap. The tweet also comes just ahead of SpaceX’s massive IPO, which is e...

item.title: Tesla patents camera wiper for self-driving — resulting in more doubts for FSD owners
item.description: Tesla has been granted a new patent for a miniature camera cleaning system with a built-in wiper designed to keep vehicle cameras clear for autonomous driving. The patent addresses one of the most frustrating and well-known issues with Tesla’s “Full Self-Driving” system — dirty cameras that const...

item.title: Tesla’s China-Made EV Deliveries Rise Nearly 40% in May Despite Intensifying Competition (TSLA)
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) reported a strong increase in sales of its China-produced electric vehicles during May, with deliveries rising 39. 4% compared with the same period a year earlier as the company continued to expand its presence in the highly competitive Chinese EV market.

item.title: SpaceX-Tesla Merger Could Trigger Elon Musk's $1 Trillion Pay Package: Report
item.description: A merger between Tesla Inc. and SpaceX could reportedly trigger Elon Musk‘s $1 trillion Tesla pay package without the EV giant having to reach any operational milestones. $1 Trillion Package Kicks In With Merger?

item.title: Sam Altman backs Alfred, a physical AI startup for robotics
item.description: Alfred, founded 9 months ago by former Tesla and Meta employees, is aiming to raise at a $40 million valuation

item.title: Tesla EU Sales Recovery Gains Steam in May
item.description: Registrations rose sharply in France and Norway as regional demand improved.

item.title: Will SpaceX and Tesla Merge? I'm Predicting a Megamerger for 1 Surprising Reason
item.description: Experts are starting to believe in a potential megamerger.

item.title: The Company That Builds The iPhone Just Unveiled A Tesla Model Y Competitor
item.description: It’s no Apple Car, but Foxconn’s Cavira gets an LFP battery and a dual-motor powertrain that can deliver up to 468 horsepower.

item.title: Here's Why Tesla Stock Soared in May (And What the SpaceX IPO Means to Tesla Investors)
item.description: Investors grew optimistic over the robotaxi rollout in early May, but there's a need to be realistic here. The SpaceX IPO is also of great significance to Tesla investors.

item.title: Is Elon Musk Selling 'Hopium' With the $1.8 Trillion SpaceX IPO?
item.description: The numbers don't add up for SpaceX's astronomical IPO valuation.

item.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Futures Edge Lower Despite AI Momentum As Iran Risks Linger: Why HPE, MRVL, INTC, TSLA, SPCE, ASTS Are In Focus
item.description: Data from Stocktwits shows that retail sentiment has held at ‘bullish’ on SPY, but sits at a cautious ‘neutral’ on QQQ.

item.title: Want Exposure to SpaceX? These 2 ETFs May Be the Ticket.
item.description: This could be a safe and easy way to get in on the SpaceX story.

item.title: TSLA Stock Climbs Premarket: Elon Musk Revives Tesla's IPO-Era Bull Case To Defend SpaceX's $1.8 Trillion Valuation
item.description: Musk defended SpaceX's lofty valuation, noting that Tesla's IPO market cap was just 0.1% of its current $1.3 trillion value.

item.title: Tesla Is Selling Discounted Used Cybertrucks Now
item.description: The cheapest used Cybertruck in Tesla’s inventory is less than $67,000. Is that enough to convince buyers, though?

item.title: Elon Musk Says Anthropic-SpaceX Deal Is Short-Term 'Because We Might Need The Compute Back' — Here's What That Means
item.description: SpaceX filed an amended IPO prospectus on Monday, stating that its agreement with Anthropic has an initial term of three months.

item.title: If S&P Dow Jones rewrites its listing rules, SpaceX and Anthropic will benefit—investors won’t
item.description: As SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI line up to go public, S&P Dow Jones is poised to waive the profitability rule that kept Tesla out for years.

item.title: SpaceX’s amended S-1 is sparking a major Tesla merger conversation
item.description: A single line buried in SpaceX’s amended S-1 filing is doing more to move Tesla’s stock price than anything Tesla itself has announced in months. The clause, disclosed as SpaceX prepares for what could be the largest IPO in Wall Street history, states that the company “may issue a significant amo...

item.title: Why Did TSLA Stock Fall Overnight? Gary Black Says SpaceX Might Be The Culprit
item.description: Investor Gary Black of The Future Fund LLC thinks that the upcoming SpaceX IPO could be behind the recent decline in Tesla Inc.‘s (NASDAQ:TSLA) stock price. SpaceX IPO Causing TSLA Decline? Sharing a screenshot of a post by influencer Sawyer Merritt on Monday, the investor weighed in on SpaceX’s ...

item.title: Tesla Stock Dips On SpaceX Merger Fears — Retail Influencer Pitches Bull Case That Could Add $450B To Valuation
item.description: Tesla influencer AleXandra Merz said that a 50/50 SpaceX-Tesla merger could revalue Tesla from $1.6 trillion to $2.05 trillion.

item.title: Tesla Faces China FSD Lawsuit As Robotics Competition Tests Valuation
item.description: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) is facing a new class-action lawsuit in China alleging false advertising and consumer fraud related to its Full Self-Driving feature. The case challenges how Tesla markets FSD in one of its most important international markets and could influence regulatory scrutiny and cons...

item.title: Rivian just achieved something Tesla has long dominated
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) has developed one of the most important advantages in the electric vehicle (EV) industry over the years. The corporation doesn’t only move a lot of EVs. It has also been a benchmark for maximizing the driving range from every kilowatt-hour of battery capacity.

item.title: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq Futures Slip After Record Rally As US-Iran War Confusion Eclipses AI Gains: TSLA, BB, META, HPE, NVDA Stocks In Focus
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump said on Monday in a post on Truth Social that “Talks are continuing, at a rapid pace, with the Islamic Republic of Iran,” although media reports indicate that Iran has hit the brakes on negotiations.

item.title: The 2019 Tesla Model 3 I got for Uber
item.description: submitted by /u/Upset_Log_9686 [link] [comments]

item.title: TSLA Stock Weakens As Elon Musk’s Optimus Faces New Challengers
item.description: Over the weekend, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman announced the launch of a dedicated OpenAI Robotics division, hinting at a new rival for Tesla’s own Optimus.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Broadcom, Micron, Nvidia, Sandisk, Tesla Are Big Movers; AI Stock Credo Plunges On Earnings
item.description: Dow Jones Futures: Broadcom, Micron, Nvidia and Sandisk were big winners Monday. Credo plunged on earnings late.

item.title: Tesla Reclaims No. 1 Position In Global Battery EV Race
item.description: Counterpoint Research data showed a changing competitive landscape in the global battery electric vehicle (BEV) market during the first quarter of 2026, with Tesla, Inc. reclaiming the top spot even as overall industry growth remained modest and demand weakened in...

item.title: BYD Takes On Crash Liability When Its Driver-Assist System Is Active!
item.description: As Tesla Full Self Driving (FSD) has gotten better and users have claimed they never have to intervene, I’ve thought, that’s great if you like that, but it doesn’t really mean anything for the market until Tesla is willing to take on liability in the event of a crash. That’s ... [continued] The...

item.title: Nvidia Has a Robot Partner. It Isn’t Tesla.
item.description: Over the weekend, at COMPUTEX 2026 in Taiwan, Nvidia announced plans to accelerate development of humanoid robots. There will be an “open humanoid robot reference design built on the Nvidia Isaac GR00T platform, combining a Unitree H2 Plus humanoid robot, Sharpa five-fingered hands for dexterous ...

item.title: Tesla’s European Comeback: Registrations soar in May as recovery gains momentum
item.description: Tesla is staging a powerful rebound in Europe. New vehicle registrations surged dramatically across multiple key markets in May 2026, signaling a strong recovery from the challenges of 2025. Data released this week show double- and triple-digit year-over-year gains in several countries, driven by...

item.title: Houston, We Have A Problem: SpaceX, Tesla, And The xAI Bailout Nobody Voted On
Tesla's Optimus faces new threat as OpenAI enters robotics
item.description: Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian joins Market Domination Overtime to discuss Tesla's (TSLA) new robotics competition in OpenAI (OPAI.PVT).

item.title: Tim Cook is just one of hundreds of CEOs quietly hitting the exits
item.description: For many Americans, the term CEO is interchangeable with owner. When they think of people like Tesla CEO Elon Musk, they think of him as the owner of the company. But Musk, and all chief executives, are employees of the companies they work for.

item.title: Former Tesla AI data trainers deliver crucial message on robotaxis
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) permabull Cathie Wood is all in on Full Self-Driving (Supervised), calling it the "most impactful AI project out there" while predicting that FSD would drive Tesla to a $2,000-per-share valuation by 2027. The Ark Invest CEO isn't the only one with high hopes for FSD. Tesla CEO Elon ...
